title: Two doors to the new work
subtitle: When adequate is free, the new demand lands on work that needs either leverage or judgment. Adopters walk through both doors. Non-adopters walk through neither.
caption: Framing for editorial use.

left.label: Leverage
left.title: Can you produce the work of five people with a harness of agents?
items: Spec, build, review, refactor run in parallel
The job shifts to enabling agents, not keystrokes
This is where the +30% engineering postings are concentrated

right.label: Judgment
right.title: Can you decide what's worth building when adequate is free?
items: AI generates 100 variants; a person picks the one to ship
Taste, strategy, and direction are what don't compress
The bottleneck moves from output to selection
